response.global_analysis: The entire video was transcribed manually as there was no vocal music present in the reference JSON. Subtitles are tightly timed to correspond to the speech of each VTuber presenter. Non-English expressions like 'oui, oui' and 'merci' were transcribed and kept in context. Visual Q&A cards for the hoodie section are also subtitled to represent the visual prompts on screen.

subtitles.original: You talk about the premium acrylic message board?
subtitles.english: You want to talk about the premium acrylic message board?

subtitles.original: Ah, yeah, yeah, sure. Oui, oui!
subtitles.english: Ah, yeah, yeah, sure. Oui, oui!

subtitles.original: This artwork is so cool! I love it so much.
subtitles.english: This artwork is so cool! I love it so much.

subtitles.original: Ah, using acrylic instead of paper was such a good choice!
subtitles.english: Ah, using acrylic instead of paper was such a good choice!

subtitles.original: And it makes it feel really special.
subtitles.english: And it makes it feel really special.

subtitles.original: And the foil-stamped replicated messages?
subtitles.english: And the foil-stamped replicated messages?

subtitles.original: That's honestly the best part! I can't stop looking at it.
subtitles.english: That's honestly the best part! I can't stop looking at it.

subtitles.original: It just looks that much good, you know? Oui, oui!
subtitles.english: It just looks that much good, you know? Oui, oui!

subtitles.original: Ah, please support Justice and buy our merch, oui?
subtitles.english: Ah, please support Justice and buy our merch, oui?

subtitles.english: Thank you. Merci!

subtitles.english: Wow, that's some pretty high praise!

subtitles.original: We caught up with Justice's leader, Elizabeth, to get her thoughts.

subtitles.original: Hm?
subtitles.english: Hm?

subtitles.original: You wanna hear about the badge?

subtitles.original: Hehe, of course!
subtitles.english: Hehe, of course!

subtitles.original: My sweethearts, my Justi-cheris, hehe.
subtitles.english: My sweethearts, my Justi-cheris, hehe.

subtitles.original: This badge was designed with the image of law enforcement and authority in mind.
subtitles.english: This badge was designed with the image of law enforcement and authority in mind.

subtitles.original: The weighty, prestigious look fits Justice perfectly, don't you think?
subtitles.english: The weighty, prestigious look fits Justice perfectly, don't you think?

subtitles.original: I think it looks absolutely... fan-tabby-dozy! It looks fantastic!

subtitles.original: Very cool.
subtitles.english: Very cool.

subtitles.original: Anyone who strives for justice should definitely get their hands on one.
subtitles.english: Anyone who strives for justice should definitely get their hands on one.

subtitles.english: Oh, and it also comes in a beautiful display box,

subtitles.original: The Double-Zip Patch Hoodie!
subtitles.english: The Double-Zip Patch Hoodie!

subtitles.original: Woah!

subtitles.english: We spoke with a fan who actually got their hands on the merch.

subtitles.english: Oh, oh my god, oh my god! I'm so excited!

subtitles.original: Q: What do you think about this item?
subtitles.english: Q: What do you think about this item?

subtitles.original: Oh, I absolutely love the design!
subtitles.english: Oh, I absolutely love the design!

subtitles.original: The patches inspired by all four members of Justice are so cute and stylish!
subtitles.english: The patches inspired by all four members of Justice are so cute and stylish!

subtitles.original: And I love how each one of them reflects their personality.
subtitles.english: And I love how each one of them reflects their personality.

subtitles.original: And... and the logo and text on the back give us such a cool, premium look!
subtitles.english: And... and the logo and text on the back give us such a cool, premium look!

subtitles.original: It's the kind of hoodie that instantly makes you think, "Mm, yes, this is Justice!"
subtitles.english: It's the kind of hoodie that instantly makes you think, "Mm, yes, this is Justice!"

subtitles.original: Q: How is it when you actually wear it?
subtitles.english: Q: How is it when you actually wear it?

subtitles.original: Oh, it's amazing!
subtitles.english: Oh, it's amazing!

subtitles.original: The brushed fleece lining makes it super warm and comfortable.
subtitles.english: The brushed fleece lining makes it super warm and comfortable.

subtitles.original: Not only does it look great...
subtitles.english: Not only does it look great...

subtitles.original: ...but it's also really practical.
subtitles.english: ...but it's also really practical.

subtitles.original: And the fact that it comes in both L and LL sizes is fantastic!
subtitles.english: And the fact that it comes in both L and LL sizes is fantastic!

subtitles.english: I think a lot of fans will appreciate having different size options.
